workflows.name: Test — runScript
workflows.description: Varianten: strukturierter param.*-Output, Native-Exit-Code via successExitCodes, isolated Prozess.

workflows.name: Test — fileOperation
workflows.description: Varianten: create → exists → copy → rename → move → delete (alle Operationen, Temp-Pfade).

workflows.name: Test — folderOperation
workflows.description: Varianten: create → exists → list → copy → rename → move → delete (alle Operationen).

workflows.name: Test — fileHash
workflows.description: Varianten: alle Algorithmen SHA256/SHA1/MD5/SHA384/SHA512 auf derselben Datei.

workflows.name: Test — zipOperation
workflows.description: Varianten: compress → extract (Round-Trip).

workflows.name: Test — serviceManagement
workflows.description: Varianten: status (Spooler, BITS) + start (Spooler — idempotent bei laufendem Dienst). Destruktive Aktionen stop/restart/create/delete/setstarttype bewusst NICHT gegen echte Dienste.

workflows.name: Test — scheduledTask
workflows.description: Variante get (übrige start/stop/enable/disable/create/delete destruktiv → nicht gegen echte Tasks). Auf diesem Host env-abhängig: eine korrupte Fremd-Task vergiftet den Get-ScheduledTask-CIM-Provider.

workflows.name: Test — registryOperation
workflows.description: Varianten: createkey → write(String) → write(DWord) → read → exists → deletevalue → deletekey (HKCU-Testschlüssel).

workflows.name: Test — wmiQuery
workflows.description: Varianten: query (className Win32_OperatingSystem) + wql (WQL SELECT). invokemethod ausgelassen (potenziell destruktiv).

workflows.name: Test — startProgram
workflows.description: Varianten: waitForExit=true, non-zero Exit + successExitCodes, waitForExit=false (fire-forget).

workflows.name: Test — powerManagement
workflows.description: Variante abort (sicherer No-Op). shutdown/restart/logoff/sleep/hibernate bewusst NICHT — würden die Maschine ausschalten.

workflows.name: Test — waitForCondition
workflows.description: Varianten: alle 5 conditionTypes — script, pathExists, serviceRunning, portOpen, httpOk.

workflows.name: Test — textFileEdit
workflows.description: Varianten: alle Operationen append/prepend/insert/replace/replaceline/delete (prep sät die Datei).

workflows.name: Test — restApi
workflows.description: Varianten: GET, GET mit Custom-Headers, GET mit Retry-Policy + Timeout (alle gegen lokale healthz).

workflows.name: Test — sql
workflows.description: Varianten: SELECT Literal, SELECT Ausdruck/CASE, SELECT Aggregat über VALUES (sqlite in-memory).

config.query: SELECT CASE WHEN 5>3 THEN 'yes' ELSE 'no' END AS cmp, 2+2 AS sum
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt, SUM(x) AS total FROM (SELECT 1 AS x UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3)

workflows.name: Test — xmlQuery
workflows.description: Varianten: resultMode single (ein Node) + all (alle Nodes als Array).

workflows.name: Test — jsonQuery
workflows.description: Varianten: resultMode single (ein Wert) + all (alle Treffer als Array).

workflows.name: Test — emailNotification
workflows.description: Varianten: Plaintext + HTML (isHtml). Umgebungsabhängig — braucht SMTP.

workflows.name: Test — generateText
workflows.description: Varianten: alle Modi alphanumeric/alphabetic/numeric/hex/guid/password/custom.

workflows.name: Test — llmQuery
workflows.description: Varianten: freier Text + jsonMode. Umgebungsabhängig — braucht Llm:Enabled=true.

workflows.name: Test — log
workflows.description: Varianten: alle Level debug/info/warning/error.

workflows.name: Test — delay
workflows.description: Varianten: verschiedene Wartezeiten.

workflows.name: Test — returnData
workflows.description: Variante: returnData mit mehreren Keys aus Upstream-Output/param/success + Literal.

workflows.name: Test — junction
workflows.description: Varianten: alle 3 Modi — waitAll (2 Zweige) → waitAny (3 Zweige) → waitNofM (req=2 von 3).

workflows.name: Test — decision
workflows.description: Varianten: mehrere Cases (high/mid/low) + default, Routing per param.case-Edges.

workflows.name: Test — forEach
workflows.description: Varianten: itemsFormat json (parallel) + lines (seriell) — ruft je Item 'Muster Test: Child'.

workflows.name: Test — startWorkflow
workflows.description: Varianten: waitForCompletion=true (blockierend, Contract gespiegelt) + false (fire-forget).

workflows.name: Test — manualTrigger
workflows.description: Trigger manualTrigger — Injected-Params via {{trg.param.X}} (input). Trigger-Läufe brauchen PublishedByUserId.

workflows.name: Test — scheduleTrigger
workflows.description: Trigger scheduleTrigger — Injected-Params via {{trg.param.X}} (firedAt, nextFireAt). Trigger-Läufe brauchen PublishedByUserId.

workflows.name: Test — webhookTrigger
workflows.description: Trigger webhookTrigger — Injected-Params via {{trg.param.X}} (webhookBody, webhookMethod, webhookPath, orderId). Trigger-Läufe brauchen PublishedByUserId.

workflows.name: Test — fileWatcherTrigger
workflows.description: Trigger fileWatcherTrigger — Injected-Params via {{trg.param.X}} (fileAction, filePath, fileName). Trigger-Läufe brauchen PublishedByUserId.

workflows.name: Test — databaseTrigger
workflows.description: Trigger databaseTrigger — Injected-Params via {{trg.param.X}} (dbSentinel, dbPrevious). Trigger-Läufe brauchen PublishedByUserId.

workflows.name: Test — eventLogTrigger
workflows.description: Trigger eventLogTrigger — Injected-Params via {{trg.param.X}} (eventSource, eventEntryType, eventId, eventMessage, eventTimeWritten). Trigger-Läufe brauchen PublishedByUserId.

workflows.name: Muster Test: Child
workflows.description: Gemeinsamer Child-Workflow für forEach/startWorkflow. manualTrigger → log → returnData.
